items.question: How do I earn Bitcoin online?
items.answer: You can earn Bitcoin online by playing crypto games, claiming from faucets, completing surveys, finishing offers, doing micro tasks, referring friends, or freelance work. Each activity rewards you with satoshis (fractions of Bitcoin) that can be withdrawn to your wallet.

items.question: Is this really free?
items.answer: Yes, signing up and earning is completely free. There are no hidden fees or subscriptions. You just complete activities and get paid in Bitcoin. Some methods like cloud mining or trading may require small investments, but most earning methods are 100% free.

items.question: How long does it take to get my first Bitcoin?
items.answer: Most users earn their first 0.00001 BTC within 24 hours of signing up. Some high-paying offers can get you to 0.001 BTC in under an hour!

items.question: How do I withdraw my Bitcoin?
items.answer: Once you have enough satoshis, go to the Withdraw section, enter your Bitcoin wallet address, choose the amount, and click Withdraw. Payments are sent instantly to your wallet via the blockchain.

items.question: What wallet should I use?
items.answer: We recommend using a personal wallet where you control the private keys. Popular options include BlueWallet, Electrum, Trust Wallet, or hardware wallets like Ledger and Trezor for larger amounts.

items.question: Is Bitcoin legal in {country}?
items.answer: Bitcoin legality varies by country. In most countries including the US, UK, Canada, Australia, and EU nations, Bitcoin is legal to own and use. Please check your local regulations. We operate in compliance with international laws.

items.question: How much can I earn per month?
items.answer: Most active users earn 0.001 - 0.01 BTC per month ($25-$250 at current prices). Power users who complete high-value offers and refer friends can earn 0.05+ BTC monthly ($1,250+).

items.question: Do I need to invest money?
items.answer: No, you can earn Bitcoin completely free without any investment. All the methods listed (games, faucets, surveys, offers, tasks) require $0 to start. Cloud mining and trading may require capital but are optional.

items.question: What are satoshis?
items.answer: Satoshis (sats) are the smallest unit of Bitcoin. 1 Bitcoin = 100,000,000 satoshis. Most rewards are paid in satoshis since they're easier to earn and transfer.

items.question: Can I earn Bitcoin on mobile?
items.answer: Absolutely! Our platform works perfectly on both desktop and mobile devices. Download crypto games from app stores and complete offers on your phone.

items.question: How are Bitcoin payments sent?
items.answer: We send Bitcoin payments directly to your wallet address via the Bitcoin blockchain. Transactions typically confirm within 10-60 minutes depending on network congestion.

items.question: What's the minimum withdrawal amount?
items.answer: The minimum withdrawal amount is 0.0001 BTC (approximately $2.50 at current prices). This helps cover blockchain transaction fees.

items.question: Are there transaction fees?
items.answer: We cover the Bitcoin network fees for your first withdrawal each month. Additional withdrawals may have a small fee to cover blockchain costs.

items.question: Can I earn Bitcoin without KYC?
items.answer: Yes! Most earning methods don't require identity verification. You can start earning Bitcoin instantly with just an email address.
